steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with $\frac{4}{13}$ in the function:
$$
f(\frac{4}{13})=\frac{4}{13}+\frac{9}{13}
$$

steps.title: Add the fractions
steps.content: The denominators are the same, so add the numerators: $$ \frac{4}{13}+\frac{9}{13}=\frac{13}{13}=1 $$ The answer is 1.
